name: Youth Meeting
description: Empowering young people to grow in faith, build godly character, and serve with purpose.

name: Women's Meeting
description: A space for women to grow spiritually, support one another, and serve God's kingdom together.

name: Children's Ministry
description: Nurturing children in the knowledge of God through age-appropriate Bible teaching and fun activities.

name: Men's Fellowship
description: Building men of integrity, faith, and servant leadership in the home, church, and community.
